description: Tests for R package skill creation functionality

evals.name: ggplot2-plot-validation
evals.prompt: Create a skill for the ggplot2 package
evals.expected_output: Skill created with plot validation patterns, references/API.md exists, SKILL.md mentions geom_* functions and ggplot() constructor

assertions.check: contains 'plot-validator' or discusses visual output validation

assertions.description: Description includes package name for triggering

evals.name: sf-geometry-validation
evals.prompt: Create a skill for the sf package
evals.expected_output: Skill created with spatial validation patterns, handles geometry operations, includes CRS guidance

assertions.description: Description includes package name for triggering

evals.name: data-table-syntax-gotchas
evals.prompt: Create a skill for the data.table package
evals.expected_output: Skill captures data.table syntax gotchas (DT[i, j, by] pattern, := operator, .SD, .N, etc.), includes performance patterns

assertions.check: contains ':=' or '.SD' or '.N' or 'DT[i, j, by]' or data.table-specific syntax
contains 'performance' or 'gotchas' or 'Common Mistakes' section exists

assertions.description: Description includes package name for triggering
